author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay - Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PS VR2 Games
Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay is coming to Playstation!

WISHLIST NOW!
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019853

Choose the way you want to play - Distorting Clay is playable in both FLAT and VR MODE, so you can immerse yourself with or without the VR headset.

Explore a mysterious world, interact with its characters and environment, and search for a way to escape the kindergarten.

Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay is not a VR remake of the original series. Rather, it's its own special story that takes place inside of Banban's Kindergarten.

Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay features the shapeshifting mechanic, allowing you to shift into familiar monsters that contain their own unique gameplay abilities and exclusive mechanics!

#ps5 #ps5games #psvr2 #psvr2games #banban

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next! -  Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next! is available now!

Hit the tennis court for some fast-paced arcade action as your favorite Nickelodeon all-star! Customize SpongeBob SquarePants, Aang, Garfield and more legendary characters, then enjoy accessible couch co-op match fun for all ages!

You will be stepping onto the court with a lineup that feels like a nostalgic all-star team. From the undersea antics of SpongeBob to the elemental mastery of Aang, the roster pulls together 15 beloved Nickelodeon characters from across generations.

Ready for more? Don’t hesitate and join community!

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter - Gameplay Deep Dive | PS5 Games
Mistfall Hunter is a dark fantasy action extraction RPG set in Weavereach, a shattered world where the gods have perished and the Gyldenmist sweeps the realm. As a Gyldhunter, venture into the heart of the corruption solo or with up to two companions, defeating twisted creatures for their spoils or hunting rival Gyldhunters for their loot. Just be careful: if you die, you lose everything. To secure a safe return to the Windrest, Gyldhunters must track down extraction opportunities hidden within the realm and ring the bell known as Soul of Return to escape. However, the Gyldenmist may conceal more than one way out.

The initial PlayStation open beta begins June 14 at 6 PM PT. Stay connected and wishlist today to prepare for the hunt.

#ps5 #ps5games  
Rated Mature

text:
NBA The Run - Open Beta Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10011746/

It's time to RUN! The open beta for NBA THE RUN is coming to PlayStation 5 Saturday, May 30th from 10:00 AM PT - 6:00 PM PT. Take some of your favorite NBA stars to iconic streetball courts around the world, stack wins and become the GOAT OF THE RUN.

NBA THE RUN is coming to PS5 on June 9, 2026 for $29.99. The Deluxe Edition is $39.99 and comes with unlocked Rookie Variants of Kevin Durant, Stephen Curry and Luka  Dončić. For more information, visit nbatherun.com. Wishlist Now!

(VO by the one, the only, Bobbito Garcia)

#ps5 #ps5games #nbatherun

text:
Beat The Champions - Launch Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/UB0946-PPSA33213_00-BEATTHECHAMPSPS5

Beat The Champions is available now!

Face legendary players in explosive matches full of rhythm, skill, and special abilities. Charge up and unleash your powers, control the pitch with precise movements, and make split-second decisions. Timing changes everything.

Beat the Champions is guaranteed fun for a World Cup year.

* Special Abilities System
* Argentina National Teams from all eras, officially licensed by AFA
* 100% Arcade Gameplay
* Dynamic and Intense Matches
* No fouls, except inside the box
* Local and Competitive Modes
* Experience the International Cup with 2026 atmosphere

Necrophosis - Full Consciousness Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017979

Necrophosis: Full Consciousness is out now on PlayStation 5!
 
Necrophosis: Full Consciousness is a first-person horror adventure that plunges you into a nightmarish realm teeming with grotesque forms and ominous visuals. Prepare to delve into eerie landscapes, solve unnerving puzzles and uncover secrets in this atmospheric journey through the macabre.

This complete edition includes the base game 'Necrophosis' and the brand new DLC 'Subconsciousness'.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Ingrid Update Launch Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/street-fighter-6/

Step into the light with the Ingrid Update in Street Fighter 6!
 
☀️ Harness the sun's power with Ingrid's Combo Trials and Character Guide
🕹️ Unlock costumes and classic character endings in Random Avatar Match and Avatar Arcade Mode
🕴️ Outfit 3 for Year 3 characters and free DriveTech Wear for all characters now available
 
Bask in the radiance of this exciting update today!
 
Ingrid can be obtained individually with Fighter Coins, and the owners of the Year 3 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to Ingrid. Owners of the Year 3 Ultimate Pass will also automatically get access to Sagat, C. Viper, Alex and Ingrid's Outfit 3.
 
Please note that Ingrid will be the final character to receive additional World Tour story content upon release. Previously added World Tour content will remain playable.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Ingrid #Capcom
